\documentclass[border=4pt]{standalone}

% --- packages (mirror these in huggingface.meta.json "requires") ---
\usepackage{tikz}
\usetikzlibrary{svg.path}

% --- brand colors (Hugging Face's official logo palette: yellow face, dark
%     eyes, red mouth, orange blush/outlines — from the official logo assets;
%     simple-icons distributes the same shape single-color) ---
\definecolor{brandhfyellow}{HTML}{FFD21E}
\definecolor{brandhforange}{HTML}{FF9D0B}
\definecolor{brandhfdark}{HTML}{3A3B45}
\definecolor{brandhfred}{HTML}{FF323D}

% y-axis pre-flipped for TikZ and scaled to ~2.5cm (svg.path ignores TikZ
% coordinate transforms, so the transform is baked into the coordinates).
% The Hugging Face logo is a trademark of its owner; used for identification.
